bead.title: test-scrub: stub the gate runner in work durable-audit tests (remove ~85s of route-resolution timeout)
bead.description:
PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE: cmd/work_durable_audit_test.go:21,62,103 set factory.tryExecutorOverride but NOT factory.AgentRunnerOverride. Per cmd/execute_loop_shared.go:288, when AgentRunnerOverride is nil the pre-claim intake / AC-quality / post-attempt-triage hooks build a live qualityRunner that attempts route resolution and blocks until timeout. Block profile: ~30s of a 35s test spent in bufio.Scanner.Scan + WaitGroup.Wait inside runAgentExecuteLoopImpl's three hooks. Three tests cost 35.5+35.5+19.1 ≈ 90s (~30% of the cmd package).

PROPOSED FIX: Set factory.AgentRunnerOverride to a deterministic stub runner in each of the three tests (factor a stubQualityRunner(t) helper). Audit other work/try cmd tests for the same nil-runner omission and fix in this bead.

NON-SCOPE: do NOT change what these tests assert (durable-audit commit behavior). Behavior/coverage preserved.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestWorkAttemptMetricsAutoCommitted, TestWorkOutcomeTrackerMutationAutoCommitted, TestWorkStopsWhenDurableAuditCommitFails each complete in <3s.
2. Their existing assertions (durable-audit commit clean via runGitWorkAudit status, bead status transitions, work-retry-after extra) are UNCHANGED — coverage preserved.
3. cd cli && go test -run 'TestWork.*AutoCommit|TestWorkStopsWhenDurableAuditCommitFails' ./cmd/ green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
